description: Phase 39 scan_invariants_relations_live: evaluate all 5 foundation relations in config/invariants.json against live atom values. Verifies functor F preserves equality — the morphism side of faithfulness (P38 was object side). Relations checked: perfect_number (sigma=2n), sigma_decomp (sigma=phi·n), J2_decomp (J2=tau·n), sopfr_phi_tau (sopfr=phi+tau-mu), granville_smooth (n=2·3). Gate: relations_failed == 0.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_invariants_relations_live.json ] && jq -r "if .relations_failed == 0 and .relations_passed >= 5 then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_invariants_relations_live.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
